---
title: "HW2_text_as_data"
author: "Ishita Vaid"
date: "2026-02-11"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#call packages

library("readr")
library("dplyr")
library("tidyr")
library("stringr")
library("tidytext")
library("ggplot2")
library("forcats")
library("tibble")
library("scales")
library("tidytext")
```

```{r}
# file paths to call files
file_a <- "texts/A07594__Circle_of_Commerce.txt"
file_b <- "texts/B14801_Free_Trade.txt"

# Read the raw text files into R
text_a <- read_file(file_a)
text_b <- read_file(file_b)

# Combine into a tibble for tidytext workflows
texts <- tibble(
  doc_title = c("Text A", "Text B"),
  text = c(text_a, text_b) 
)

texts
```

```{r}
#tokenize and clean text

tidy_tokens <- texts %>%
  unnest_tokens(word, text) %>%       
  mutate(word = str_to_lower(word)) %>% 
  anti_join(all_stopwords, by = "word") 

tidy_tokens

```

```{r}
#join tokens to bing sentiment dictionary

bing <- get_sentiments("bing")

tokens_sentiment <- tidy_tokens %>%
  inner_join(bing, by = "word")

tokens_sentiment


```

```{r}
#compute raw sentiment totals

sentiment_totals <- tokens_sentiment %>%
  group_by(doc_title, sentiment) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = sentiment,
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0
  ) %>%
  mutate(net_sentiment = positive - negative)

sentiment_totals


```

```{r}
#compute TF-IDF for words in each document

word_counts <- tidy_tokens %>%
  count(doc_title, word, sort = TRUE)

word_tfidf <- word_counts %>%
  bind_tf_idf(term = word, document = doc_title, n = n)

word_tfidf


```

```{r}
# Keep only sentiment-bearing words 
tfidf_sentiment <- word_tfidf %>%
  inner_join(bing, by = "word")

tfidf_sentiment

```

```{r}
# Compute TF-IDF–weighted sentiment totals

tfidf_sentiment_summary <- tfidf_sentiment %>%
  group_by(doc_title, sentiment) %>%
  summarise(total_tfidf = sum(tf_idf), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = sentiment,
    values_from = total_tfidf,
    values_fill = 0
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    net_tfidf_sentiment = positive - negative
  )

tfidf_sentiment_summary

```

```{r}
#Compare Raw vs. TF-IDF Sentiment

final_sentiment_comparison <- sentiment_totals %>%
  left_join(tfidf_sentiment_summary, by = "doc_title")

final_sentiment_comparison

```

```{r}
write_csv(final_sentiment_comparison, "final_sentiment_comparison.csv")
```
